title: bad-on-purpose output
description: Structured output from Bad on Purpose: deliberately terrible ideas with reverse-engineered value.

id.description: Unique idea identifier, e.g. b1, b2

assumption_violated.description: The rule or assumption this bad idea breaks

five_percent_version.description: A toned-down version that is just weird enough to be interesting and viable

door_opened.description: The direction or territory this bad idea pointed toward

id.description: Extracted value identifier, e.g. bv1, bv2

source_id.description: ID of the bad idea this came from (e.g. b1)

type.description: Whether this is a viable toned-down idea or a direction to explore

extracted_value.description: Clean list of the 5% versions and opened doors — the actual outputs
